description_long: This object is a rectangular computer monitor with a dark, wood-textured frame and a vibrant, pixelated display featuring a geometric, multicolored pattern. The front face is dominated by the screen, which is bordered by a thick, dark bezel with a subtle wood grain appearance. The sides are narrow and show the depth of the monitor, while the back panel is composed of vertically aligned, dark wooden planks, giving it a rustic and unconventional look for a monitor. No visible buttons, ports, or branding are present on any side. The monitor appears solid and robust, with a flat back and no visible stand or mounting hardware. The overall design is unique, blending digital display technology with a natural, wooden aesthetic.
description: A rectangular computer monitor with a thick, dark wood-textured bezel and a vibrant, multicolored geometric display. The back is made of dark wooden planks, giving it a rustic appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the colorful, pixelated display framed by a thick, dark wood-textured bezel.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the monitor's narrow depth and the continuation of the wood texture along the edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying vertically aligned, dark wooden planks with visible grain and knots.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the monitor's slim profile and wood-textured edge.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thick, rectangular, and features a dark wood grain texture with a matte finish. It has sharp corners and no visible decorative elements or color contrast.
attribute_stand_type: No stand is visible; the monitor appears to lack any supporting base or mounting hardware.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
